# Neonatal Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, model, variant;
- device type;
- patient population;
- temperature/humidity control;
- ventilation/respiratory support if applicable;
- alarms;
- accessories;
- infection-control features.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- IFU/user manual;
- datasheet;
- accessory/consumable list;
- service manual if public.

## Key Characteristics

- Patient weight range;
- temperature range;
- humidity range;
- oxygen control;
- noise level;
- mattress dimensions;
- battery/transport capability;
- alarm types.

## Compatibility Requirements

- Sensors;
- humidification accessories;
- patient circuits;
- mattress/accessory kits;
- trolleys;
- phototherapy attachments.

## Common Conflicts

- Patient weight ranges vary by mode.
- Incubator/accessory bundles differ.
- Neonatal ventilation modes are configuration-sensitive.
- Service documents may be restricted.

## Review Notes

Neonatal patient claims are high-risk and require explicit document evidence.
